prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ULTRALIGHTBOTTLES-3PK Product Type: BOTTLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3pk Ultralight Travel Bottles TSA Compliant 1oz Capacity Food Grade Description: Stay hydrated on land, air or sea with the 3pk of ASR Outdoor Ultralight Bottles.

These bottles each hold up to 1 fluid ounce of liquid, and are constructed of food grade BPA free plastic. They are TSA compliant, so you can rest assured they won't be thrown out or confiscated at the air port.

Each set comes with one yellow bottle, one blue bottle and one pink bottle. Make sure you keep a set of these in your backpack, purse or travel bag before your next trip. Search Terms: camping hiking sporting events flasks alcohol bladder Features: - ASR Outdoor Ultralight Travel Bottles - 3 Piece Set - Food Grade & BPA Free Plastic - Capacity: 1 Fluid Ounce Per Each Bottle - Colors: Pink, Blue & Yellow - TSA Compliant === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pk 1oz Travel Bottles Pink Blue Yellow

anthropic.title_differentiation: TSA Compliant, Food Grade BPA-Free, Ultralight, Perfect For Camping Hiking And Travel

openai.title_differentiation: TSA Compliant, BPA-Free Food Grade Plastic, 1 Fl Oz Each, Pink Blue And Yellow, Ultralight Travel Size
